No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links game theory applications to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links game theory applications to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly lists '醫病互動' (doctor-patient interaction) as an application, which relates to managing health systems and interactions (Target 3.d).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly develops systematic thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills (Target 4.4, 4.7).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Game theory is applied to '選舉投票' (elections) and '國際關係' (international relations), aiming to '設計達到多贏的互動機制' (design win-win interaction mechanisms) for effective institutions (Targets 16.6, 16.7).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course covers '合作賽局' (cooperative games) and aims to '設計達到多贏的互動機制' (design win-win interaction mechanisms), directly supporting effective multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
